messages.content: who are you? and who am i?
I am Jarvis, your AI assistant. And as for you, Moksh, I've had the pleasure of assisting you in our previous conversations, particularly regarding the situation in Iran.
let's not talk about iran, what is the time right now?
The current time is 11:22:13 on Sunday, 15 March 2026.
good, do you know i ove to play EFOOTBALL alot?
You're an avid player of eFootball, Moksh. I recall that you enjoy spending time on the virtual pitch, managing your favorite teams and players. How's your recent form been?
Glad to hear that your eFootball skills are on point, Moksh. Consistency is key, so keep up the good work.
which game i love to play?
You love to play eFootball, Moksh.
